name: zoetrop-design-bridge-harness
description: Local runtime + deps for the zoetrop design-roundtrip harness. zoetrop keeps design-bridge at the repo root (not inside remix-app), so the synced CORE in .staging-core resolves its runtime deps (postcss for token-sync/gate, tar for decode) from THIS node_modules — remix-app/node_modules is not an ancestor of .staging-core. tsx/typescript run + typecheck the bins. node_modules here is gitignored; run `npm install` in this dir once (and after CORE dep bumps).
